name: team_espn_win_rates
expected_query: with "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."pass_rush_win_rate" AS "espn_team_pass_rush_win_rate_0", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."pass_block_win_rate" AS "espn_team_pass_block_win_rate_0", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."run_block_win_rate" AS "espn_team_run_block_win_rate_0", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."run_stop_win_rate" AS "espn_team_run_stop_win_rate_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 left join "espn_team_win_rates_index" as "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79" on "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."year" = "player_year_teams"."year" group by "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."pass_rush_win_rate", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."pass_block_win_rate", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."run_block_win_rate", "t23f8087ef193e4aef5a2bc0caa5c5c79"."run_stop_win_rate", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
